---
title: "Publications"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis

pubs <- yaml::read_yaml("data/publications.yml")

# FIX: sort list correctly (no comma!)
pubs <- pubs[order(sapply(pubs, function(x) -as.numeric(x$year)))]

for (p in pubs) {

  cat("### 📄 ", p$title, "\n\n")

  cat(p$authors, "\n\n")

  cat("*", p$type, " • ", p$venue, " • ", p$year, "*\n\n", sep="")

  if (!is.null(p$link)) {
    cat("🔗 [View publication](", p$link, ")\n\n")
  }

  cat("---\n\n")
}
```
